'''zhosanaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:fodderless|fodderless]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-s-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fodderless|fodderless]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhosanaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhosanithi|zhosanithi]] || [[word:zhosaniji|zhosaniji]] || [[word:zhosanishi|zhosanishi]] || [[word:zhosaniki|zhosaniki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhosanuthuthu|zhosanuthuthu]] || [[word:zhosanujuju|zhosanujuju]] || [[word:zhosanushushu|zhosanushushu]] || [[word:zhosanukuku|zhosanukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhosanuthu|zhosanuthu]] || [[word:zhosanuju|zhosanuju]] || [[word:zhosanushu|zhosanushu]] || [[word:zhosanuku|zhosanuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhosanufthuf|zhosanufthuf]] || [[word:zhosanufjuf|zhosanufjuf]] || [[word:zhosanufshuf|zhosanufshuf]] || [[word:zhosanufkuf|zhosanufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhosanethe|zhosanethe]] || [[word:zhosaneje|zhosaneje]] || [[word:zhosaneshe|zhosaneshe]] || [[word:zhosaneke|zhosaneke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhosanothotho|zhosanothotho]] || [[word:zhosanojojo|zhosanojojo]] || [[word:zhosanoshosho|zhosanoshosho]] || [[word:zhosanokoko|zhosanokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhosanotho|zhosanotho]] || [[word:zhosanojo|zhosanojo]] || [[word:zhosanosho|zhosanosho]] || [[word:zhosanoko|zhosanoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhosanofthof|zhosanofthof]] || [[word:zhosanofjof|zhosanofjof]] || [[word:zhosanofshof|zhosanofshof]] || [[word:zhosanofkof|zhosanofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhosanïfthïf|zhosanïfthïf]] || [[word:zhosanïfjïf|zhosanïfjïf]] || [[word:zhosanïfshïf|zhosanïfshïf]] || [[word:zhosanïfkïf|zhosanïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhosanïfthïfthïf|zhosanïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:zhosanïfjïfjïf|zhosanïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:zhosanïfshïfshïf|zhosanïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:zhosanïfkïfkïf|zhosanïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhosanïfthïf|zhosanïfthïf]] || [[word:zhosanïfjïf|zhosanïfjïf]] || [[word:zhosanïfshïf|zhosanïfshïf]] || [[word:zhosanïfkïf|zhosanïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhosanïfthïf|zhosanïfthïf]] || [[word:zhosanïfjïf|zhosanïfjïf]] || [[word:zhosanïfshïf|zhosanïfshïf]] || [[word:zhosanïfkïf|zhosanïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhosanæthæ|zhosanæthæ]] || [[word:zhosanæjæ|zhosanæjæ]] || [[word:zhosanæshæ|zhosanæshæ]] || [[word:zhosanækæ|zhosanækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhosanathatha|zhosanathatha]] || [[word:zhosanajaja|zhosanajaja]] || [[word:zhosanashasha|zhosanashasha]] || [[word:zhosanakaka|zhosanakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhosanatha|zhosanatha]] || [[word:zhosanaja|zhosanaja]] || [[word:zhosanasha|zhosanasha]] || [[word:zhosanaka|zhosanaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhosanafthaf|zhosanafthaf]] || [[word:zhosanafjaf|zhosanafjaf]] || [[word:zhosanafshaf|zhosanafshaf]] || [[word:zhosanafkaf|zhosanafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zhosanasha|zhosanasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhosanshësha|zhosanshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhosanrosha|zhosanrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhosanmusha|zhosanmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhosanyasha|zhosanyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhosankshësha|gozhosankshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhosankrosha|gozhosankrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhosankmusha|gozhosankmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhosankyasha|gozhosankyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zhosasanasha|zhosasanasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhosasanshësha|zhosasanshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhosasanrosha|zhosasanrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhosasanmusha|zhosasanmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhosasanyasha|zhosasanyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhosasankshësha|gozhosasankshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhosasankrosha|gozhosasankrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhosasankmusha|gozhosasankmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhosasankyasha|gozhosasankyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zhesænasha|zhesænasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhesænshësha|zhesænshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhesænrosha|zhesænrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhesænmusha|zhesænmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhesænyasha|zhesænyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhesænkshësha|gozhesænkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhesænkrosha|gozhesænkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhesænkmusha|gozhesænkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhesænkyasha|gozhesænkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zhosfanasha|zhosfanasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhosfanshësha|zhosfanshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhosfanrosha|zhosfanrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhosfanmusha|zhosfanmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhosfanyasha|zhosfanyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhosfankshësha|gozhosfankshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhosfankrosha|gozhosfankrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhosfankmusha|gozhosfankmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhosfankyasha|gozhosfankyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
